skill.wo_traveloptics.aqua_the_eternal_l: KEY1: Basic Attack, Aqua Trident of The Deepsea
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack | Jump + KEY1: Airslash Attack

§bTidal Slash §f(KEY1_2, Press Left & Right Click Mouse at the same time): Slashing the water slash deal more damage, mob got hit received Wet Effect (can't steal mana)  (Consume 2 stack & Cooldown 16s)

§bSelf-Electrocuted Chargee §f(KEY3 + KEY1): Strike a lightning at your position, then CHARGEEE (FORWARD) breakthrough (1.5x Damage) & Knockdown your enemies with the power of aquatic (Consume 1 stacks & Cooldown: 10s

§bGlorious Thunderstorm §f(KEY4): Enhanced Version of Wrathful Lightning that call powerful lightning strikes at nearby enemies, create Tsunami go forward and thunderstorm duration in 15s (Consume 3 stacks & Cooldown: 35s)
skill.wo_traveloptics.core_of_infernal.t: KEY1: Normal Attack, Moveset of the Nether Warmachine
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Punch 'Sweep'), Jump + KEY1: Airslash (Slam)
§6Lava Bomb §f(KEY3): Shoot a lava bomb that explodes when impact the ground leaving a small pool of lava (Cooldown: 7,5s / Consumes 1 Stack)

§6Rumbling Ground §f(Combo: KEY1_2/Press Right-click & Left-click mouses at the same time + KEY2 + KEY2): Impact the ground create multiple flame jets nearby you that deal high damage and inflict fires (No Cooldown / Consumes 1 stack, Total Consumes: 2 stacks)

§6Gyro Slash of Hell §f(KEY4): Sweep attack created fire "ring slash" go forward, mob got hit received Flare Vacumm effect that activate after 3s and call the flame jets surrounded them (Cooldown: 15s / Consumes 2 stacks)
skill.wo_traveloptics.electric_sands.too: §bCharged Sands §fis long range melee weapon - Spear, with charged lightning inside of the §eAncient Spear §f, it's effective on conductor electricity to large number of enemy when they are near each others
§bMelee Autos:§f Basic swings §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§bEnergized Thrust:§f Thrusting 2 lightning spears then backslash created 1 lightning sandstorm forward §b[Melee Autos + KEY3]
§l§bSweeping Sands:§f Sweep off 4 Lightning Sandstorms, after 1.5s of flying forward... homing nearest target §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]
§l§bCharged Stomp:§f Charge forward create Stomp AoE forward radiating 3 row of Lightning Strikes §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY3]

§l§bVoltage Buster:§f Jump Slammed strikes down Lightning Strikes, exploding on impact that creating Lightning Sparks bounce randomly, Lightning Sandstorms pull out around caster and after 0.5s of flying, targeting nearest enemies §b(Cooldown: 15s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY3 + KEY4]

skill.wo_traveloptics.infernal_volcano.t: KEY1: Normal Attacks, Hold my Dual Hellfire Gauntlets
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Off-hand Sweep) | Jump + KEY1: Airslash (Dual Overhead)
§6Trio Flares §f(Combo): After performs all normal attacks combo, press KEY2 (3 times) to performs 3 combos that shoot flare bomb (one each combo) (No Cooldown / Consumes 1 stack)
§6Triple BOOM Shoots §f(KEY3): Shoot 3 Lava Bombs (Cooldown: 10s / Consumes 1 Stack)
§6Magma Eruption §f(KEY4): Enhanced Ver. of Rumbling Ground, Create small duration of earthquake and call numerous flame jets around you (Cooldown: 25s / Consumes 3 Stacks)

§cMelee §9Autos§f: Swing to more heavily swing §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§cDown th§9en Up§f: Overhead Swing to Heavily Uppercut §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§cHand's §9Conductor§f: Sweep off... charges up your offhand a Lightning Ball §b[§cMelee §9Autos §b+ KEY3]

§l§cMagnetic §9Pulse§f: Jump Slam created shockwave of magnetic lightning dealing AOE Damage by 6 radius (6x7x6), stunning nearby enemies for 4s, and adding 10 §9Azures §f/ §cScarlets §f(Max: 40 §9Azures §f/ §cScarlets§f) to target §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consumes 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]
skill.wo_traveloptics.natural_rising.too: KEY1: Basic Attack, Amethyst Crab Movement
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Heavy) | Jump + KEY1: Airslash Attack
§aNatural Healing §f(KEY1_2 | Press Left and Right Click mouse at the same time): Gains Oak Skin (Reduce 30% Damage received) in 15s and Regeneration in 8s (Required at least 1 stack & Cooldown: 5s)
§aOvergrown Roots §f(KEY3): Placing traps that after 3s growing a root which catching all mobs in range and trapped them in 10s (Consume 2 stacks & Cooldown: 10s)
§aEarthquake §f(KEY4): Jump and slam the ground causing earthquake in 10 radius (10 Block Range) knockdown your enemies and deal massive damage (Consume 3 stacks & Cooldown: 20s)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip1: KEY1: Normal Attacks, Moveset of The Nightwarden
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip2: Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Spining) | Jump + KEY1: Airslash Attack (Air Sweep)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip3: §dSpining Scythe Forward §f(Combo): After perform all of normal attacks, press KEY2 to perform bonus special spining attack (No Cooldown / No Consumes)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip4: §dCrossed Void Slash §f(Combo): Perform first 4 combos then press KEY2 to slash powerful void slash that go forward and extend its size in the path, mob got hit goes fly to sky for 3s and instant heavily fall down (Cooldown: 7,5s / Consumes 2 stacks)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip5: §dPath of Exploding Clones §f(KEY3): Fast spining forward, create many clones of nightwarden that explode after 3s in 3,5 radius, deal high damage to nearby mobs [Press KEY3 once again to perform Ender Step Forward] (Cooldown: 20s / Consumes 2 Stacks)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip6: §dBig Slam: Double Rows of Deadly Spikes §f(KEY1_2, Press Right-Click + Left-Click Mouses at the same time): Scaling up your scythe, slam the ground create 2 rows of Dimensional Spikes (Cooldown: 15s / Consumes 1 Stack)
skill.wo_traveloptics.nightfall.tooltip7: §dBig Slam: Rise of Ender §f(KEY4): Scaling up your scythe, slam the ground create Rings of Dimensional Spikes & 3 End Eruption around the point of the "scythe-head" slam (Cooldown: 25s / Consumes 2 Stacks)
skill.wo_traveloptics.reaper_of_outer_re: Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Clawstrike) | Jump + KEY1: Airslash Attack (Slam)
§5Ender Rage §f(KEY1_2, Press Left Mouse + Right Mouse at the same time): Your rage stuns nearby enemies and your next attack deal 30% more damage in 10s (Consume 1 stack & Cooldown: 15s)
§5Vortex Storm §f(KEY3): Summoning Vortex Storm that will activate after 3s deal damage and push enemies to the sky and they'll get fall damage (Consume 2 stacks & Cooldown: 20s)
§5Guardian Dominate §f(KEY4 + KEY1): Teleport to the sky & heavy slam deal high damage and create void rune around you (Consume 3 stacks & Cooldown: 30s)
skill.wo_traveloptics.sandstorm_awaken.t: KEY1 (Left-click Mouse): Normal Attack, Moveset of the Elder Undead Spinnosaurus
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Sweep), Jump + KEY1: Airslash Attack (Backup Strikes)
§eStomp Strikes §f(Combo) : After perform all Normal Attacks (KEY1) press KEY3 to perform dash stomp strike then press KEY1 to perform 2 combos stomp strikes left (Cooldown: 10s/ Consumes 1 Stack)
§eDesert Winds Slasher §f(KEY1_2/ Press Left-click mouse & Right-click mouse at the same time): Spining attacks shoot small sandstorms forward (Cooldown: 5s/ Cosume: 1 Stack)
§eSurrounded Storm of Sands §f(KEY3): Roar nearby enemies made them stun and create 3 Sandstorms spining arround you & last for 15s (Cooldown: 15s/ Consumes 2 stacks)

§eSteles Falling §f(KEY4): Fast sweep attack & Calling multiple Ancient Desert Steles on top of your head 8 blocks away arround you by rings, continue falling down deal huge damage (Cooldown: 10s / Consumes 3 stacks)
skill.wo_traveloptics.sharpshooter.toolt: KEY1: Normal Attacks, Movesets like? The Cybord Wither
Sprint + KEY1: Dash Attack (Overhead), Jump + KEY1: Airslash (Spinin' Kick)
§cAir Shoot §f(Airslash/Jump Attack + KEY1): After perform stylish kick shoot 2 laser projectiles (Consumes 2 Stacks)
§cBurst Shoot §f(KEY3 + KEY3): Combo 1: Shoot 3 laser projectiles, next Combo: Backup and Shoot 2 laser projectiles (Total Consumes 5 stacks)
§cDash Shoot §f(KEY1_2, Press Right-Click mouse + Left-Click mouse at the same time): "Dash over it" shoot 2 lasers (Consumes 2 stacks)
